title: Pyrus cordigastensis
taxonomy: Pyrus cordigastensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a type of pear tree, and its classification places it within the genus Pyrus. The genus Pyrus is a group of deciduous trees and shrubs native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Pyrus cordigastensis is specifically classified as a species within the Pyrus genus. The classification of Pyrus cordigastensis is further refined by its placement within the Rosaceae family of flowering plants.
